composite_figures.policy: Kept as composite single-PNG blocks for v1 (no per-option splitting). Phase 2 crops the entire reference + sub-options block as one PNG; Phase 4 renders it inline like any other figure. Splitting per-option deferred to v1.1.

instances.description: Reference vector + 5 sub-fig candidate vectors A-E (multiple-choice "which is opposite to a")
Reference linear graph y=ax+b + 5 sub-fig parabola candidates A-E (multiple-choice "which y=ax²+bx is possible")
Two cone views side-by-side (frustum + full cone with shaded internal frustum) — both are inseparable for the problem
